'''Nam Poorf''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Holding no official rank within the Order, Poorf had failed out of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] and been placed within the [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|Agricultural Corps]]. Following the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Poorf went into hiding with fellow surviving Jedi during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] near birth, Poorf studied at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] for several years before trying, and failing, to [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduate]]. With this failure, the [[Council of Reassignment/Legends|Council of Reassignment]] placed Poorf in the [[Jedi Service Corps/Legends|Jedi Service Corps]], assigning him to the [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|Agricultural Corps]]. Stationed on the stripped-mined world of [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]], Poorf worked to help restore the world's ruined landscape with other AgriCorps members, such as Jedi [[Jambe Lu]].<ref name="DL" />

As the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] tore across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Poorf remained out of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and had little interaction with the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] that fought for the Republic. At the end of the war, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] betrayed the Jedi Order, issuing [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] commanding all clone units open fire on their [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]]. At the time, Poorf and Lu were on their way back to Coruscant when word reached them of the catastrophe happening throughout the galaxy. Fleeing, the pair eventually met up with eight fellow survivors who had hijacked a [[SX troop transport|SX troop shuttle]] on [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]]. While departing Dellalt, four of the other Jedi were killed when the group came under fire from a group of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170s]] and a light cruiser that gave pursuit. Limping between the stars, the Jedi were eventually rescued by the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''.<ref name="DL" />

Aboard [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Jula Shryne]]'s ship, the Jedi were kept safe for a time as they traveled through space avoiding the Empire. When [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Shyrne's son, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Roan Shryne]] was rescued and joined the crew, the Jedi became reinvigorated and ready to confront the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lords of the Sith]] who controlled the Empire. Landing on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] in search of [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], the Jedi were trapped on the world when the Empire launched an [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|attack]] on the world, led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. When Vader confronted the Jedi, Poorf attempted to kill the Sith Lord but lost his right leg to Vader's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Saved from death by his comrades, the surviving Jedi were able to escape the planet, committing their lives to subtly sabotage the Empire from the inside until someone stronger came along and overthrew the Sith.<ref name="DL" />
